name: CLAUDE.md Development Guide
applicability: Their CLAUDE.md is 498 lines of structured developer guidance — grep-friendly naming, NO MOCKS testing philosophy, coverage-as-dead-code-finder, migration strategy. Directly comparable to SoNash CLAUDE.md (135 lines). Their approach to naming conventions and testing philosophy is portable.
home_connection: CLAUDE.md format comparison, testing philosophy for SoNash test suite

name: MCP Server Auto-Discovery Pattern
applicability: Zero-schema MCP server that introspects Click CLI commands. ~200 lines. Auto-generates tool definitions from existing CLI metadata. Direct pattern for JASON-OS Domain 02a (MCP-native tooling).
home_connection: JASON-OS MCP research, mcp-builder skill, Claude Code MCP servers

name: Hook Execution Model
applicability: Production-grade hook system: event-family naming convention, 2-digit ordering, foreground/background execution, SIGTERM finalization for bg hooks, JSONL stdout contract. Directly relevant to SoNash hook ecosystem.
home_connection: SoNash pre-commit/pre-push hooks, hook-ecosystem-audit, session hooks

name: Plugin Isolation Architecture
applicability: Chrome plugins forbidden from importing ArchiveBox/Django. Only 2 shared files allowed. Principle of plugin independence. Relevant as architecture reference for SoNash skill isolation.
home_connection: Skill ecosystem design, agent isolation patterns

name: NO MOCKS Testing Philosophy
applicability: Real databases, real subprocess calls, NO SKIPS, strict assertions (== not >=). Philosophy contrast with SoNash node:test approach that uses httpsCallable mocking.

name: Coverage as Dead Code Detector
applicability: Using coverage JSON output + jq pipelines to find 0% files as dead code candidates. Passive coverage collection during dev server usage. Could inform SoNash orphan detection approach.
home_connection: T21 orphan detection, code quality tooling

name: Grep-Friendly Naming Convention
applicability: Consistent prefixes (fs_*, log_*) enabling grep-based code navigation. Philosophy of fewest unique names. Relevant to SoNash script naming conventions.
home_connection: SoNash scripts/ naming, code navigation patterns

name: Claude Code CI Integration
applicability: Claude Code running in GitHub Actions CI. Forward-thinking pattern for AI-assisted development in CI.
home_connection: JASON-OS CI/CD research, GitHub Actions automation

name: Architecture Planning Documents (old/)
applicability: 12 TODO/planning documents showing design evolution. Historical interest but outdated. Hook architecture docs relevant as comparison.

name: abx-plugins (sibling package)
applicability: External plugin package ecosystem. Relevant if evaluating ArchiveBox for adoption but not for pattern extraction.

name: abx-dl (event bus framework)
applicability: Event bus / downloader framework. TypedEvents + BaseService pattern. Architecture reference.
